/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcheckers_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcheckers_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
